payload.text:
**Adding New Features**

I'm making progress on incorporating the requested new features into the app. I've begun integrating the `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` model for image generation using "Nano Banana Pro" and am adding an image size specification option for users. This will allow greater control over output.


**Refining Model Integration**

I'm now focusing on integrating the `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` model. I've realized the existing logo generator uses a different generation model, so I'll need to adapt the code to handle the API differences. My understanding is that the response structure of this new model differs, and I need to add UI controls for image size selection (1K, 2K, 4K) as the model supports. I plan to create a toggle to switch between models.


**Expanding Image Editing**

I'm now expanding the app's image editing capabilities with text prompts, using the `gemini-2.5-flash-image` model. Users will be able to provide instructions like "Add a retro filter" or "Remove person." This will involve adding an "Edit with AI" feature to the image editor. I plan to use `generateContent` with a base64 encoded image and a text prompt to achieve this, which means some UI updates are needed.

\n\n

**Adding Image Analysis**

Now I'm planning to incorporate an image analysis feature. I'll allow users to upload images for analysis using the `gemini-3-pro-preview` model. This will provide functionality for users to understand images and generate prompts from analysis. I'm thinking of this as a "Logo Analyzer" feature. This section will be separate from the existing logo generation part of the app.


**Updating Image Generation**

I'm now switching the core image generation to `gemini-3-pro-image-preview`, responding to the prompt's preference. I've updated the `handleGenerate` function to use the new model. The next step will involve adding a dropdown for image size selection (1K, 2K, 4K) in the UI, defaulting to 1K, as I adapt the API call to include this new parameter and aspect ratio. I will also be verifying the response structure.


**Implementing AI Image Editing**

I'm now integrating AI-powered image editing, using `gemini-2.5-flash-image` and "Nano Banana". I'm creating a new "AI Edit" tab in the existing editor with an instruction text area and "Generate Edit" button, planning to include the model API call. I'm focusing on displaying the result; either replacing the existing canvas or displaying them side by side.


**Adding Logo Analysis**

I'm now implementing the logo analysis feature. I've got a UI for image upload using a file input and will call the `gemini-3-pro-preview` model upon upload. I'm focusing on analyzing the logo's style, colors, and industry fit. The UI will display the analysis text. I plan to add a button to "Use this prompt" to populate a text area, and have added state management for `analysisResult` and `analyzing`.


**Integrating New Functionality**

I'm now integrating new components and refining API interactions. I've added state for `aiEditPrompt` and `aiEditing`, and an "Image Size" selector for image generation near the aspect ratio input. I've also built out the "Analyze Existing Logo" section with file upload and result display and an "AI Edit" text input and button in the editing modal. I'm focusing on adapting API usage for `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` and implementing functions for analyzing and AI editing. I am planning to test the updated logic.


**Refining Image Generation**

I'm now focusing on adapting the image generation with the `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` model, aiming for high quality images. I'm exploring how to handle the generation of multiple images, potentially looping requests or checking for the model's support for `candidateCount`. I plan to test generating either one or two images at a time for efficiency and cost effectiveness. The existing app generates multiple images, so I'll review and replace that logic.


**Updating UI and Logic**

I'm now focused on the UI and application logic to support the new features. I'm adding a specific handler for image size and updating the `AppState` interface to include `imageSize`. In the HTML, I'm integrating styles for the file upload, analysis result box, and the AI edit controls within the modal. I am adapting `aspect-ratio-button` styles for size selection. I plan to test the updated logic.


**Implementing Core Functions**

I'm now implementing the core functions for image generation, analysis, and AI editing. I am replacing the `imagen-4.0` model with `gemini-3-pro-image-preview`, adjusting the response handling to filter for `inlineData`. I've added functions for file upload and image analysis using `gemini-3-pro-preview`, and added the AI edit interface using `gemini-2.5-flash-image` with "Nano Banana Pro" in the edit modal. I am ready to generate, analyze, and edit images!


**Designing New Interfaces**

I'm now structuring the user interface and UX for the new features. I'm focusing on the image size selector, which will use similar buttons to the aspect ratio controls. I'm considering placing the "Logo Analyzer" section below the existing form, possibly as a new tab, given the "Prompt Engineer" focus of the app. Finally, I'm planning to split the controls within the image editing modal into "Manual Adjustments" and "AI Magic" sections for a cleaner look.


**Implementing Gemini Features**

I am now implementing the new features in the app. I'm focusing on the UI structure, implementing a tab system for "Create" and "Analyze" functionality. I am adapting the existing code to include the new features and make changes in `index.tsx`, adding the logic for converting file uploads to base64 for API requests using `fileToGenerativePart`. I'm starting to build the necessary structure to support the "Create" and "Analyze" sections. I will now prepare the XML structure.


**Implementing Tab Functionality**

I'm now implementing a tab system in the UI for a better user experience, adding both "Create" and "Analyze" sections. I'm updating `index.tsx` by integrating a new `activeTab` state variable to manage which section is displayed, and also making changes in the HTML structure. I'm focusing on defining logic to use file inputs for analysis and prepare base64 encoded images. I'm planning to make a full review and testing of the structure.


**Adapting Single Image Generation**

I'm now refining the image generation process to align with `gemini-3-pro-image-preview`, focusing on producing high-quality single images. The original setup showed a grid of images, which I will adapt to accommodate the generation of a single image. Although the UI displayed multiple placeholder images in the grid, the app currently replaces the existing images with the new result set. I will maintain this single-image approach for now for reliability.


**Integrating New State**

I'm now integrating new state variables into the app. I'm adding `aspectRatio`, `imageSize`, and `activeTab` to `AppState` within `index.tsx`, along with initial states within `defaultState`. The goal is to manage the active tab in the UI using 'create' and 'analyze', which impacts the visible sections of the UI, and manage the parameters for API calls. I'm working to parse `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` responses.


**Adding AI Editing Capabilities**

I'm now integrating an "AI Edit" feature into the image editing modal. Users will be able to provide instructions via a text prompt, such as "Add a retro filter". I plan to use the `gemini-2.5-flash-image` model to make the edits and show the result. I am also planning to add "image understanding" functionality with the `gemini-3-pro-preview` model for image analysis.


**Designing UI Tabs**

I'm now integrating the provided CSS into `index.html` to create a tabbed interface. I've designed `tab` functionality with buttons and hover styles, focusing on the UI's aesthetic. I will adapt these styles to match our design system. I'm focusing on file upload area styling, including the dashed border, hover effects, and hidden file input. I am ready to test the HTML and style structure.


**Adapting Image Generation**

I'm now adapting the single image generation for the new model, with plans to streamline this approach for optimal performance and user experience. To handle image generation with `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` I am going to make only one API call and remove the multiple image loop. This offers improved reliability. I'll focus on UI updates for the single image display.
Here are the changes to update the application with Nano Banana Pro image generation, Nano Banana (Flash) image editing, and Image Analysis features.

entries.description: Implement Gemini 3 Pro Image generation, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image editing, and Gemini 3 Pro logo analysis.
Add styles for tabs, file upload, image size selector, and AI edit controls.
